classic.notes:
A full touchscreen redesign of Music Boss Classic for Pebble Time 2 and Round 2. Tap, swipe, and flick to control playback over full-screen album art. Three live layouts - Retro+, Modern Classic, and Modern Time - with deep customization from the on-watch menus: text position, multiple fonts and sizes, colours, drop shadow, album-art modes (full / letterbox), scrim, and one-tap presets. Double-press Up/Down to seek; volume ring overlay. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.119

Display & text:
- Retro+ and Modern Classic now have their own independent element settings - style each layout's track / artist / album separately.
- Long titles handled properly: a new track scrolls its title once, then settles into a tidy 2-line display when it fits the font.
- Fixed text clipping - letters with tails (g, j, q, p, y) are no longer cut off.
- Fixed spacing so a 2-line album no longer touches the app name; the album shortens to one line when space is tight.

Scrolling:
- Auto-scroll is more reliable - long titles scroll, and a wrist flick, play/pause, closing the overlay, or the Scroll Text action all restart the scroll.

Backgrounds & fixes:
- Retro+ background (Art Colour / Black / White) now sticks - it no longer reverts to the album-art colour on track changes.
- The font picker now shows the real name for the app-name font (previously labelled just "Font").

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
